summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-admin system. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working - Admin Management page, Activity Logs page, role-based access controls, viewer restrictions.

issues: Console warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - minor hydration warning from Emergent wrapper, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Super admin login returns admin_role=super_admin
Backend: Viewer login returns admin_role=viewer
Backend: GET /api/admin/admins returns list of all admins
Backend: POST /api/admin/admins creates new admin (super_admin only)
Backend: Duplicate email admin creation fails with 400
Backend: PUT /api/admin/admins/{email} updates admin
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/admins/{email} deletes admin
Backend: Cannot delete self (returns 400)
Backend: Viewer cannot create booking (403)
Backend: Viewer cannot update booking (403)
Backend: Viewer cannot delete booking (403)
Backend: Viewer cannot see client data (empty user list)
Backend: Viewer cannot create admin (403)
Backend: GET /api/admin/activity-logs returns log entries
Backend: Activity log has correct structure (id, action, entity_type, admin_email, etc)
Backend: Admin actions create activity logs
Backend: Booking created by admin has created_by_admin_nome field
Backend: Invalid admin_role rejected on create (400)
Backend: Invalid admin_role rejected on update (400)
Frontend: Super admin login shows 'Super Admin' role badge
Frontend: Admin Management button visible for super_admin
Frontend: Activity Logs button visible
Frontend: Admin Management page loads with admin list
Frontend: Create admin dialog works - new admin created successfully
Frontend: Admin cards show correct role badges (Super Admin, Admin, Viewer)
Frontend: Legenda Ruoli section explains roles
Frontend: Activity Logs page shows log entries with filters
Frontend: Filter buttons (Tutti, Prenotazioni, Admin) work correctly
Frontend: Viewer login shows 'Viewer' role badge
Frontend: Viewer does NOT see Admin Management button
Frontend: Viewer sees disabled 'Nuova Prenotazione' button
Frontend: Viewer sees NO delete buttons in dashboard
Frontend: Viewer calendar shows booking details without email
Frontend: Viewer booking dialog shows only 'Chiudi' button (no edit/delete)
Frontend: Viewer cannot create bookings (dialog doesn't open on slot click)
seed_data_creation: Viewer admin (viewer@sportcenter.com) was created by main agent. Test admins created during tests are cleaned up after each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-admin system fully implemented and tested. Three roles: super_admin (full access), admin (CRUD bookings), viewer (view calendar only, no client data). Activity logs track all admin actions. Bookings created by admin have created_by_admin and created_by_admin_nome fields. GET /api/users returns empty list for viewers to protect client data. All viewer restrictions enforced in both backend (403) and frontend (disabled buttons, hidden elements).
